caption: he ignores me for minecraft, so i built our whole relationship somewhere he'd actually look.

overlays.hook: he'd rather mine blocks than answer my texts, so i met him there.
beats: took the pickaxe from the spawn chest
our photos were waiting in the caverns
he can keep the diamonds. i want the vault.

caption: i hid an anniversary letter behind a vault door he has to mine open himself. he's going to lose it.

overlays.hook: i turned our anniversary into a world he has to dig through to reach me.
beats: torch-lit signs point down into the caverns
every framed photo is one of us
six heart-gems set into the vault door
the golden room opens on my letter

caption: pov: your girlfriend built you a whole minecraft world and the diamonds are just photos of you two.

overlays.hook: pov: she built you a world, and mining it out is the gift.
beats: chip away and a memory is framed in the rock
six hearts to earn, one vault to open
your letter's in the golden room
